content.problemStatement:
A food fair is being organised in Chef's town. NNN booths were set up in a straight line and numbered 111 through NNN. For each iii (1тЙдiтЙдN1 \le i \le N1тЙдiтЙдN), the probability with which the food served at booth iii will cause food poisoning at the beginning of the day is PiP_iPiтАЛ.

Over the course of the day, the Chef observes that certain booths might decide to offer less unhealthy food based on feedback from customers. You should process QQQ queries of the following two types:


0тАЕтАКLтАЕтАКR0\;L\;R0LR тАФ Compute the probability that eating at each booth between booths LLL and RRR (inclusive) does not cause food poisoning.
1тАЕтАКLтАЕтАКRтАЕтАКT1\;L\;R\;T1LRT тАФ Each booth between booths LLL and RRR (inclusive) starts offering food that is TTT times more likely to cause food poisoning.
constraints: all decimals on the input will be given with at most 6 fractional digits
ExplanationThe answer to the first query is (1тИТ0.1)тЛЕ(1тИТ0.25)тЛЕ(1тИТ0.85)=0.10125(1 - 0.1) \cdot (1 - 0.25) \cdot (1 - 0.85) = 0.10125(1тИТ0.1)тЛЕ(1тИТ0.25)тЛЕ(1тИТ0.85)=0.10125.
After the second query, the probabilities of getting food poisoning at each booth become [0.1,0.1825,0.6205,0.3139][0.1, 0.1825, 0.6205, 0.3139][0.1,0.1825,0.6205,0.3139].
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated decimal numbers P1,P2,P3,тАж,PNP_1, P_2, P_3, \dots, P_NP1тАЛ,P2тАЛ,P3тАЛ,тАж,PNтАЛ.
Each of the following QQQ lines describes one query in the format 0тАЕтАКLтАЕтАКR0\;L\;R0LR or 1тАЕтАКLтАЕтАКRтАЕтАКT1\;L\;R\;T1LRT. Here, LLL and RRR are integers and TTT is a decimal number.
content.outputFormat: For each query of type 000, print a single line containing one real number тАФ the probability of not getting food poisoning. Your answer will be considered correct if its absolute error doesn't exceed 10тИТ610^{-6}10тИТ6.
